text:
Created attachment 175617
WITHOUT_NIS rc.d-scripts patch

make delete-old doesn't delete NIS-related /etc/rc.d scripts with WITHOUT_NIS option enabled

/etc/rc.d/ypbind
/etc/rc.d/ypldap
/etc/rc.d/yppasswdd
/etc/rc.d/ypserv
/etc/rc.d/ypset
/etc/rc.d/ypupdated
/etc/rc.d/ypxfrd
